case_title: POLLARD RENEE IND DBA TO THE NINES VS ROBINSON MYCHAEL T0DD IND DBA DIVAS ONLY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY POLLARD RENEE IND DBA TO THE NINES AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON MYCHAEL T0DD IND DBA DIVAS ONLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
